security.title: Five reasons to trust nobody.
security.subtitle: We removed every way we could harm you. What remains is code, published, locked, and verified by people who don't work for us.
security.reason1Body: The contract is deployed and renounced. No admin keys, no upgrade proxy, no pause function. Not even the founders can modify it.
security.reason2Body: Yield is generated from protocol-owned liquidity pools — not from new deposits. The math works even if no new members join.
security.reason3Body: Ownership was renounced at deployment. There is no wallet that can drain funds, freeze accounts, or change parameters.
security.reason4Body: The full contract source is published and verified on BscScan. Anyone can read every line before depositing a single dollar.
security.reason5Body: We put $100,000 USDT on the table for anyone who finds a real vulnerability. Open to all, no NDA, paid within 7 days of verification.
security.metaTitle: TurboLoop Security — Immutable Smart Contract & $100K Bounty
security.metaDesc: TurboLoop's smart contract is immutable, renounced, and open source. No admin keys, no upgrade proxy. $100,000 USDT bounty for verified vulnerabilities.

events.findYourCallDetail: Live links go up daily in our official Telegram. Pick your language, hop in.

social-wall.submitBody: Made a TurboLoop video? Share the link — approved submissions are featured here within 48 hours and may qualify for Creator Star payouts.
social-wall.refreshNote: Featured picks first · refreshed every 5 minutes
social-wall.emptyBody: Be the first to land here — submit your TurboLoop video and the team will approve within 48 hours.

ecosystem.title: Six pillars. One engine.
ecosystem.subtitle: TurboLoop isn't a single product — it's six DeFi primitives working together as a self-sustaining flywheel. Each one feeds the others.
ecosystem.pillar1Body: Fixed-term USDT deposits that generate daily yield. Choose 30, 60, or 90-day plans. Principal is locked; earnings compound or withdraw daily.
ecosystem.pillar2Body: 12% on Level 1 referrals, 3% on Level 2. Paid instantly in USDT on every deposit your network makes — no waiting, no minimums.
ecosystem.pillar3Body: Short-burst 7-day plans for members who want faster liquidity cycles. Same daily yield logic, compressed timeline.
ecosystem.pillar4Body: Earn per-view payouts for TurboLoop content. Submit your video, get approved, and collect USDT every time it's watched.
ecosystem.pillar5Body: Host weekly community Zoom sessions in your language. We cover your operating costs — $100/month stipend paid in USDT.
ecosystem.pillar6Body: Up to $100,000 USDT for verified smart contract vulnerabilities. Open to anyone, anywhere. No NDA required.
ecosystem.metaTitle: The TurboLoop Ecosystem — Six DeFi Pillars
ecosystem.metaDesc: Explore the six interconnected DeFi primitives that power TurboLoop: Loop Plans, Referral Engine, Sprint Loop, Creator Economy, Local Presenter Program, and Security Bounty.

promotions.bountyBody: Find a centralization risk, a vulnerability, or a rug-pull mechanism in the deployed smart contract. If verified, $100,000 paid in USDT within 7 days.

learn.title: Learn DeFi from zero.
learn.subtitle: Short explainers for people who've never touched crypto. No jargon, no fluff. Each one ends with how it connects to TurboLoop.
learn.lesson1Body: Decentralized Finance explained in plain English. What it is, why it matters, and how it's different from a bank.
learn.lesson2Body: Self-executing code on the blockchain. No middleman, no trust required — the rules are written in the contract.
learn.lesson3Body: Crypto that doesn't go up and down. USDT, USDC — pegged to the dollar so your principal stays stable.
learn.lesson4Body: Earning passive income by putting your stablecoins to work in DeFi protocols. How it works, what the risks are.
learn.lesson5Body: Step-by-step guide to reading a smart contract on BscScan. What to look for, what red flags mean.
learn.metaTitle: Learn DeFi — Free Beginner Guides | TurboLoop
learn.metaDesc: New to DeFi? Learn what yield farming is, how smart contracts work, what stablecoins are, and how to earn passive income on BSC. Free guides, no jargon.
